ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "length_cm" REAL /* Length of the clothing item in centimeters */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest width of the clothing item in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width of the clothing item in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length of the clothing item in centimeters */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement for pants and dresses */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement for pants and dresses */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam length for pants */,
  "rise_cm" REAL /* Rise measurement for pants */,
  "arm_hole_cm" REAL /* Arm hole measurement for shirts and dresses */,
  "neck_cm" REAL /* Neck measurement for shirts and dresses */,
  "skirt_length_cm" REAL /* Skirt length for dresses and skirts */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product ID */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ID */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product variant */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "return_count" INTEGER /* Number of units returned */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of customer reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "fabric" TEXT /* Fabric type of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "styling_tips" TEXT /* Styling tips for the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main product image */,
  "secondary_image_url" TEXT /* URL to a secondary product image */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., In Stock, Out of Stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Customer's height in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Customer's weight in kilograms */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Customer's chest measurement */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Customer's hip measurement */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Customer's inseam measurement */,
  "shoulder_cm" REAL /* Customer's shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_cm" REAL /* Customer's sleeve measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)
